app_subtitle: Fast, clear and safer Windows cleanup
sec_system_sub: Safe core locations for quick cleanup.
sec_net_sub: Browser caches, Discord and small network fixes.
sec_deep_sub: More serious locations. Some modules need admin rights.
sec_gamer_sub: Shader caches, launcher leftovers and light gaming-related cleanup.
sec_ult_sub: Only if you really know what you are doing.
analysis_idle: Analysis has not been started yet. You can first check how much junk was found.
selected_reset_hint: Selection cleared. Pick modules or use a profile.
pick_one_module: First select at least one module.
no_noticeable_junk: No noticeable junk was found in the selected folders.
stop_requested: Stop requested. Current batch will finish safely.
analysis_done_no_delete: Analysis completed. No files were deleted.
stop_update_services: Stopping Windows Update services to clean cache...
dism_busy_close_blocked: DISM is still running. Closing is blocked until it finishes.
dism_started: DISM started. This is a heavy module, so disk and CPU may sweat a little.
recycle_fail: Failed to empty Recycle Bin or it is already empty.
winsock_ok: Winsock reset. Restart your PC for full effect.
game_dvr_ok: Xbox Game Bar and DVR disabled.
game_dvr_fail: Failed to change Xbox Game Bar / DVR settings.
high_perf_fail: Failed to change the power plan.
task.user_temp.title: User Temp ({path})
task.user_temp.desc: Temporary files of the current user. Almost always a safe pick.
task.system_temp.title: System Temp ({path})
task.system_temp.desc: Windows system temp. Best cleaned with administrator rights.
task.recent_docs.title: Recent Items
task.recent_docs.desc: Clears Explorer history of recently opened files.
task.thumb_cache.title: Thumbnail Cache
task.thumb_cache.desc: Thumbnail cache. Windows will rebuild it automatically.
task.browser_chrome.title: Google Chrome Cache
task.browser_chrome.desc: Cached pages, media and temporary network files.
task.browser_edge.title: Microsoft Edge Cache
task.browser_edge.desc: Cached pages, media and temporary network files.
task.browser_brave.title: Brave Cache
task.browser_brave.desc: Cached pages, media and temporary network files.
task.browser_opera.title: Opera Cache
task.browser_opera.desc: Temporary files and Opera browser cache.
task.discord_cache.title: Discord Cache
task.discord_gpu_cache.title: Discord GPU Cache
task.firefox_cache2.title: Firefox Cache2 ({profile})
task.firefox_startupCache.title: Firefox Startup Cache ({profile})
task.dns_flush.title: Flush DNS Cache
task.dns_flush.desc: Clears the DNS cache. Useful for weird network hiccups.
task.prefetch.title: Windows Prefetch
task.prefetch.desc: Program launch traces. Windows will rebuild them after cleanup.
task.error_logs.title: Windows Error Reporting Logs
task.update_cache_files.title: Windows Update Download Cache
task.delivery_opt.title: Delivery Optimization Cache
task.recycle.title: Empty Recycle Bin
task.reset_winsock.title: Reset Winsock
task.reset_winsock.desc: Resets the network stack. Useful for odd socket issues. A restart is recommended afterward.
task.dx_shader_cache.title: DirectX Shader Cache
task.dx_shader_cache.desc: DirectX shader cache. First game launch may stutter a bit after cleaning.
task.nvidia_dx.title: NVIDIA DXCache
task.nvidia_gl.title: NVIDIA GLCache
task.nvidia_nv_cache.title: NVIDIA Driver Cache
task.amd_dx.title: AMD DxCache
task.amd_gl.title: AMD GLCache
task.steam_htmlcache.title: Steam Browser Cache
task.steam_htmlcache.desc: Cache of the built-in Steam browser.
task.battle_net_cache.title: Battle.net Cache
task.epic_webcache.title: Epic Games Web Cache
task.epic_webcache.desc: Chromium cache of the Epic Games launcher.
task.temp_capture_cache.title: OBS Browser Cache
task.temp_capture_cache.desc: Light cleanup of OBS browser source cache.
task.disable_gamedvr.title: Disable Xbox Game Bar & DVR
task.disable_gamedvr.desc: Disables Xbox Game Bar overlay and Game DVR background capture to reduce overhead while playing.
task.high_perf_plan.title: High Performance Power Plan
task.high_perf_plan.desc: Switches to High Performance. Best for plugged-in PCs.
task.ultimate_perf_plan.title: Ultimate Performance
task.ultimate_perf_plan.desc: A more aggressive power profile. Can increase heat and power draw.
task.dism_clean.title: DISM Component Cleanup
task.dism_clean.desc: Heavy but useful WinSxS cleanup module. Takes a while.
about_desc: FreeCleaner helps you safely remove temporary files and small leftovers to free space and make Windows feel lighter.
about_license_sub: How you may use and distribute FreeCleaner.
about_privacy_sub: What data FreeCleaner does (and does not) collect.
about_hint_body: • FreeCleaner works locally on your PC.\n• We do not upload your files anywhere.\n• You can read and copy documents right in the app.
sec_optimizer_sub: Core Windows gaming tweaks: Game Mode, Xbox overlay, and power plans without the usual snake oil.
task.enable_game_mode.title: Enable Windows Game Mode
task.enable_game_mode.desc: Enables Windows Game Mode to reduce background interference while gaming.
tab_cleaner_sub: Cleanup caches, temp files and launcher leftovers.
tab_optimizer_sub: Gaming tweaks and helpful Windows settings for WoW.
sec_optimizer_tools_sub: Everything below only opens official Windows settings pages: graphics, Captures, Game Mode, visual effects, and other useful gaming pages.
task.disable_notifications.title: Open Do Not Disturb / Focus Assist
task.disable_notifications.desc: Opens Windows notification settings so you can reduce pop-ups and interruptions during gaming sessions.
task.open_visual_effects.title: Open Visual Effects performance options
task.open_visual_effects.desc: Opens the Performance Options dialog where you can switch Windows visual effects to best performance.
task.open_graphics_defaults.title: Open Graphics default settings
task.open_graphics_defaults.desc: Opens the Windows graphics defaults page for Optimizations for windowed games, Variable Refresh Rate and hardware GPU features when supported.
task.open_graphics_apps.title: Open per-app graphics settings
task.open_graphics_apps.desc: Opens Graphics settings so you can set wow.exe or Battle.net to High performance on systems with multiple GPUs.
focus_assist_ok: Opened Do Not Disturb / Focus Assist settings.
visual_effects_ok: Opened Performance Options. You can switch visual effects to best performance there.
graphics_defaults_fail: Failed to open Graphics default settings.
graphics_apps_fail: Failed to open per-app Graphics settings.
admin_required_for_this: Administrator rights are required for this action.
restore_registry_admin_required: Run FreeCleaner as administrator to restore the registry backup.
registry_backup_failed: Failed to create a registry backup. Changes were not applied.
registry_restore_ok: Registry backup restored. A system restart is recommended.
registry_restore_fail: Failed to restore the registry backup.
reboot_recommended: A system restart is recommended for this change to fully apply.
sec_optimizer_registry_sub: Advanced tweaks for WoW and other games. FreeCleaner creates a registry backup next to the app before applying these changes.
task.disable_hags.title: Disable HAGS (often used as a WoW workaround)
task.disable_hags.desc: Disables Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling through the registry. Some WoW players report fewer stutters and hitches with HAGS off on Windows 11. Restart required.
task.disable_power_throttling.title: Disable Power Throttling
task.disable_power_throttling.desc: Turns off Windows power throttling through the power policy registry setting. This may reduce unwanted throttling of game-related workloads. Restart required.
task.network_throttling_off.title: Disable Network Throttling Index
task.network_throttling_off.desc: Sets NetworkThrottlingIndex=ffffffff in Multimedia SystemProfile. This is a common gamer network tweak aimed at reducing packet throttling and latency spikes. Restart required.
task.mmcss_gaming_profile.title: Apply MMCSS Games profile
task.mmcss_gaming_profile.desc: Tunes SystemResponsiveness and the MMCSS Tasks\Games profile for gaming: GPU Priority, CPU Priority, Scheduling Category, and SFIO Priority. This is an advanced tweak and should be tested carefully. Restart required.
hags_off_ok: HAGS disabled. Restart Windows and test WoW for stutter or hitching.
hags_off_fail: Failed to disable HAGS through the registry.
network_throttling_ok: Network Throttling Index disabled for the gaming profile.
network_throttling_fail: Failed to change Network Throttling Index.
mmcss_profile_fail: Failed to apply MMCSS Games profile.
task.open_game_mode_settings.title: Open Game Mode settings
task.open_game_mode_settings.desc: Opens the official Windows Game Mode page so you can quickly verify the setting manually.
task.open_capture_settings.title: Open Captures / DVR settings
task.open_capture_settings.desc: Opens the Windows Captures page to review background recording and Game DVR settings.
game_mode_page_fail: Failed to open the Game Mode page.
captures_page_fail: Failed to open the Captures / DVR page.
